summary: Godoc comment on RenderPastePipelineINI updated to comprehensively enumerate all validation errors that RenderPastePipeline can return, replacing the previous comment that only mentioned duplicate middleware names. Change is documentation-only — no logic modified.

tests_checklist.item: Table-driven tests with Gomega dot-import and NewGomegaWithT(t)

code_quality_checklist.item: Godoc comment accurately reflects function behavior

security_checklist.item: No user inputs to validate (pure functions with typed Go inputs)
No Kubernetes API calls (pure functions only)

Change is minimal and scoped to documentation
